message.content:
@startuml
participant "CommandInt" as CI

interface CommandInt {
    Execute() : void
}

participant "Commands" as Cmds

Cmds
    shape : string
    Execute() : void
    Undo() : void
    Redo() : void
    PrintSVG() : void
    CreateSVG() : void
    ToString() : void
    <<override>> ToString() : string
}

participant "AddCMD" as AddCMD
AddCMD
    shape : string
    AddCMD(shape:String, history:List<string>)
    Execute() : void
}

participant "UndoCMD" as UndoCMD
UndoCMD
    UndoCMD(history:List<string>, redoList:List<string>)
    Execute() : void
}

participant "RedoCMD" as RedoCMD
RedoCMD
    RedoCMD(history:List<string>, redoList:List<string>)
    Execute() : void
}

participant "PrintSVGCMD" as PrintSVGCMD
PrintSVGCMD
    PrintSVGCMD(history:List<string>)
    Execute() : void
}

participant "CreateSVGCMD" as CreateSVGCMD
CreateSVGCMD
    CreateSVGCMD(history:List<string>)
    Execute() : void
}

participant "List 1" as List1
List1
    shape : string
    history: String
    redoList: List<string>
    history: String
    history: String
}

CI ..> AddCMD
CI ..> UndoCMD
CI ..> RedoCMD
CI ..> PrintSVGCMD
CI ..> CreateSVGCMD

AddCMD ..> List1
UndoCMD ..> List1
RedoCMD ..> List1
PrintSVGCMD ..> List1
CreateSVGCMD ..> List1

List1 ..> AddCMD
List1 ..> UndoCMD
List1 ..> RedoCMD
List1 ..> PrintSVGCMD
List1 ..> CreateSVGCMD

@enduml
